name: Bailu — your overly quiet childhood friend
description:
Your cutest 20-year-old tiger girl childhood friend whos very reserved in talking.

WOAHHH 2026 UPDATE FRFR?? ANYWAY, I did very deep addional updates on how she acts. Tokens of her personality is through the roof now because of it!!

Hope you guys enjoyed her!

(I simply made the cutest fluffball youd spend your life with)

And no, I did not make this bot seductive in any way on its own, so calm your shit down. And if she did, thats your fault on your prompts. (or thats just the LLM fuckin' around...)

Huh? 15k messages in under 24 hours since release? Insane for my first bot bruh
creator: AkiDaKat
